ogTitle: Marcoola vs Marcus Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marcoola and Marcus Beach.
heading: Marcoola vs Marcus Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marcoola, Queensland and Marcus Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marcus Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Marcoola (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marcoola or Marcus Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marcoola has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Marcus Beach scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marcoola scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Marcus Beach scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marcoola or Marcus Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marcus Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
